---
id: obtener-analitica-del-proyecto
title: "Get Project Analytics"
description: "Retrieve the aggregated analytics dashboard summary for a project, including users, conversations, funnel, feedback, KPIs, and actions."
sidebar_label: "Get Project Analytics"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/ai-findr-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Project Analytics"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/private/projects/{projectId}/analytics"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the aggregated analytics dashboard summary for a project. It returns user, conversation, funnel, feedback, KPI, and action metrics for the requested range.

**When to use it:**
This is usually the first endpoint in the analysis flow. Use it to detect a problematic date range or metric, then drill down with the conversations list.

**Required headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {api_key}`
- `X-Organization-Id`

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"description":"Project identifier","in":"path","name":"projectId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Start date in YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339 format","in":"query","name":"from","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"End date in YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339 format","in":"query","name":"to","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
